calendar.matters:
Quiet Title In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On April 15, 2003.
Off Calendar Apr-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan. Clerks: P. Dias/Sajja R., Reporter: Adonis Duffy. Peter B. Bothe, Esq. represented Douglas Mandel. James Jaoz was sworn and examined on behalf of the plaintiff. Based on evidence received, the Court orders Quiet Title as to the subject property as described in the claim and the judgment. Order signed in open court.
